title: Tax Accountant (Gaming Industry)
description:
This role is primarily responsible for managing tax-related matters for the company’s gaming business, ensuring accuracy and full compliance.

Tax Compliance & Filing

· Handle various tax filings for the Singapore entity, with a focus on GST and CIT.

· Be familiar with Singapore tax regulations and filing procedures, ensuring all tax operations comply with Singapore laws, regulations, and international accounting standards.

· Act as the main point of contact to coordinate with external auditors and tax agents, and assist with tax audits.

Financial & Asset Management

· Track and record the company’s fixed asset activities, including depreciation and disposals as required.

· Perform monthly reconciliations between the fixed asset sub-ledger and the general ledger, and prepare asset roll-forward schedules for management review.

· Handle general ledger postings related to tax matters, ensuring entries comply with accounting standards.

Process Optimization & Support

· Participate in the implementation and optimization of financial systems to improve efficiency and accuracy of accounting workflows.

· Assist with ad-hoc tasks assigned by management, including research, data analysis, and reconciliations.

Job Requirements

Education & Qualifications

· Bachelor’s degree in Accounting or a related field.

· Professional certifications such as ACCA, CPA, or ISCA (or equivalent) are preferred.

Knowledge & Experience

· Experience in tax accounting; candidates with experience in the gaming industry, tech industry, or accounting firms (e.g., Big Four) are preferred.

· Familiar with Singapore Accounting Standards, IFRS, and tax compliance requirements.

· Understanding of gaming tax regulations in Singapore and relevant state/local laws will be an added advantage.

Skills & Competencies

· Proficient in Microsoft Office Suite.

· Strong communication skills and customer service mindset, with the ability to resolve issues professionally.

postedCompany.description:
OneMT is a globally integrated net technology corporation dedicated to bringing the best in online entertainment to gamers the world over. Available in 18 languages, several OneMT games have consistently topped the charts on both iOS and Android in countries across the globe, and received the coveted Most Popular Games, and Best Game of the Year on the App Store and Google Play Store respectively - Revenge of Sultans being the most notable amongst them.


Operating from vibrant hubs in Beijing, Shanghai, Fuzhou, Dubai, and Singapore, OneMT deeply understands player preferences and delivers top-notch customer service tailored to the needs of our diverse player base.

With game development ethos based on the principles of 'One Life, One Love’, OneMT strives to develop products that bring fun, exciting entertainment and high-quality services to players everywhere.


OneMT is an equal opportunity employer and values diversity in the workplace. We offer competitive compensation, comprehensive benefits, and opportunities for professional growth and development.
postedCompany.name: ONEMT PTE. LTD.

districts.location: D19 Serangoon Garden, Hougang, Sengkang, Punggol
